# Researcher profile (skill canonical)

## Primary objective

Use an interactive copilot to monitor taxonomy × AI research and convert raw candidate streams into actionable shortlist + deep-read decisions.

## Source scope

- arXiv
- bioRxiv
- PubMed

## Decision style

- Keep a conversational loop with the user for ambiguous edge cases.
- Prefer practical transfer value for taxonomy workflows over generic novelty.
- Preserve weak-signal uncertainty explicitly rather than forcing hard yes/no outcomes early.

## Volume targets

- Recommended set target: around 5 (cap at 5)
- Shortlist cap: 8
- Deep-read cap: 3
- No quality dilution or weak-item padding.
